svg.text: DISCIPLINE COLOUR — WHOLE SHEET TAKES ONE (family type, hand-set)
last 4 — full history on register + CDE
Shows the last 4 issues; the table can never outgrow the sheet.
Older issues remain queryable on the CDE and register sheet.
One bullet per clouded change; clouds on plans
roles per ISO 19650-2 · contacts in the BEP
Auto-filters to this discipline; splits to columns.
Quote the clause/section where each standard governs.
